pages.title: Before Freeze
pages.text: Required before the permanent world: client worldgen approval, Geolosys balance, IR pass, HBM client in-world pass, Distant Horizons visual/performance pass, and a clean dedicated-server stability pass.

pages.title: IR Status
pages.text: Current IR candidate is isolated. It reaches dedicated server startup but logs IR/UMC classloading errors, so it is not approved for the main baseline.
